actions.summary: Add later-prefix or suffix-window eval artifacts instead of pretending the first bounded window says enough about the full 9x9 trace.
success_criteria: Persist at least one non-zero-offset target window report.
Keep every window report explicit about which target slice it covers.

actions.summary: Either increase the learned lane context budget or adopt an explicitly windowed long-trace training/eval regime beyond the first 512 tokens.
success_criteria: Full 9x9 prompt-plus-target fit becomes truthful, or later windows are covered by explicit machine-readable reports.
No artifact implies full-trace 9x9 exactness before that fit exists.

actions.summary: Keep the 9x9 learned lane in a partial state until bounded windows are exact and the full-trace fit problem is solved honestly.
success_criteria: Audit language continues to say `9x9 only partially fit and remains blocked` until the blocker is actually removed.
